rationale: Revalidated every persisted Broadway/Q70 source search and registry match against the current corpus fingerprint for retrospective language stating an exact physical activation date. The May presentation remains only a forecast, while later official sources establish delivered status by an as-of date without stating when the lane physically opened. Current corpus changes outside this event add no source-connected Broadway onset evidence.
